patches.rationale: Wrong DOI for Cummer 2000. The current link (10.1049/ip-map:20030535) points to IEE Proceedings — Microwaves, Antennas and Propagation. Cummer's actual paper is in IEEE Transactions on Antennas and Propagation (DOI 10.1109/8.898776). A dome defender could use this citation error to question our source-checking.
